D1 Optics L3 Apply Atom

Grazing Angle Reflection

tilt the eye toward grazing and watch every surface — even matte paper — become a near-perfect mirror

Fresnel reflectance for both polarisations approaches 1 as the incidence angle approaches 90° — at extreme grazing, any surface mirrors.

Slide θ from near-normal to grazing. The right-hand bar tracks the unpolarised reflectance; past 80° it spikes toward unity regardless of n.
